verse_text: Then the Jews answered and said to Him, 'Do we not say rightly that You are a Samaritan and have a demon?'

pericope.title: Sons of the Devil Reject the Son of God

links.context: The Samaritan, while a despised foreigner, is an image of Christ ([[JOH.8:48]]), for He "came down from heaven" (Creed) to save even those in rebellion against Him.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
